## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Attention and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and optimization efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows steady growth: 99 articles published, new highs in clicks (49) and impressions (19-20k weekly)](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Focus on AI tools for follow-up emails performing well; strategy to build content cluster around this topic](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Content enrichment in progress: revamping top 10 performing articles with improved readability, visuals, and custom images](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [Discussion on using Clay and RV2B for capturing ICP data and lead scoring from blog traffic](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [99 articles published to date (1 shy of 100)](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [New weekly highs: 49 clicks, \~20k impressions](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [10 new articles launched on meeting day (not yet reflected in metrics)](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - ["AI tools to automate follow-up" article performing best](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Strategy: capitalize on successful topics, build content clusters (e.g., AI, follow-up emails, sales angle)](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Top 20 performing articles updated with best keywords and rankings](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
      - "Sales framework" ranking \#8 for its keyword
      - ["Sales incentives" showing good performance](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

### Content Enrichment Strategy

  - [Top 10 performing articles being revamped:](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
      - [Improving readability](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
      - [Enhancing intros](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
      - [Adding screenshots and custom images](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
      - [Potential for small infographics](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [No strict brand guidelines for custom images; standard color template available](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Plan to continue enrichment with next 10 best-performing articles after completion](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)

### ICP Traffic Analysis

  - [Discussion on using Clay and RV2B for traffic analysis](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Attention already uses both tools](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Focus on identifying visitors within ICP:](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Company demographics](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
      - [Job titles (person-level identification)](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Google Search Console limited to basic demographics (e.g., location)](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Potential to explore additional tools if current solutions provide low identification rates](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)

### SEO Testing and Performance

  - [SEO testing set up and processing](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - Batch \#5 (started Nov 23) showing 94% increase
  - [Previous batch showing 100% increase in clicks per day](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Need to investigate why earlier batches aren't showing results](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Content Strategy and Future Plans

  - [Working on 10 new articles, awaiting green light for editors and writers](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
  - [Focusing on content refreshes and enrichments](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [Discussed successful blog templates from other clients (e.g., Swab Stacks)](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=659.0)
  - [Consideration for adding in-content CTAs to improve conversions](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Next steps: focus on Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) after content enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Explore potential for Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) strategies](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Attention to review Clay and RV2B data for ICP traffic insights](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [fwd.digital to maintain communication via Slack for any additional needs or updates](https://fathom.video/share/4t_v-z_jGVyHdzxxaPs1GzTRfNcWLbYz?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
